states.name: Kadu Ogre
states.title: The Ever-Devouring Tempest
states.description: The Kadu are a race of beings that left their homeland after devouring everything there. Ever hungry, one of their two mouths is constantly eating. This behavior often results in conflict with other species, who do not enjoy having their homes devoured.

states.name: Kadu Ogre
states.title: The Ever-Devouring Tempest
states.description: An apocryphal tale say a Kadu was once confronted after eating a village. Seeing that the Kadu seemed somewhat remorseful, a clever young man proposed a deal with her—if she protected their land from invaders, she could eat the invaders, along with a certain amount of the village's food supply. This worked well for both parties, until the Kadu decided she missed the taste of village.
